title: Acme flips to flat pricing
summary: Acme scrapped tiered pricing for a single flat plan after a competitive analysis.
what_they_built: A flat monthly plan for new customers.
evidence: Conversion rose 12% and average ticket price increased.
why_it_matters: A first-hand example of value-based repositioning.

title: Globex rebuilds onboarding
summary: Globex reduced signup friction by cutting onboarding steps.
evidence: Directional; the team reported faster activation.
why_it_matters: Friction removal as an activation lever.

title: Initech pricing experiments
summary: Initech ran a series of pricing A/B tests before a repackaging.
evidence: Revenue per account up 8% in the winning cell.
